_doc: Ice Age (ICE) booster recipe. Generated by scripts/gen-booster-contents.mjs from data/_collation-facts/ice.json (source: The Collation Project, lethe.xyz/mtg/collation). Edit the facts file and regenerate; do not hand-edit this file unless you also remove its facts source. Set composition: 121C / 121U / 121R / 0M. Collation: striped, 11x11 sheets. Pre-mythic era: rare slot is rare-only. Notes: Large set printed in Belgium with striped collation. 36 packs per box. Set has three variations of each standard basic land plus five snow-covered basics, but lands are not in boosters. Pre-1999, no foils.
